'''''Deadman's Hand''''' was [[Dunari]]'s personal [[Muurian transport]].

With this, he helped [[Emon Azzameen]] escape from [[Quesna Base]]. Later, it was used to help the [[Azzameen family|Azzameen]] siblings escape an ambush set up by their uncle [[Antan Azzameen|Antan]] in the [[Kessel Station]].

==Beind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Dead_Man%27s_Hand|Dead Man's Hand]] is also a term used in poker.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
